creator: jacobsm@gate.net
text:
Ports were cvsuped as of 19:00 et tonight.

Attempted to install October gnome update tonight. Reached link
of cbbdslave in gnomemedia port which failed with undefined
 reference to `ghttp_set_proxy_authinfo'

How-To-Repeat: Issue make all install in /usr/ports/x11/gnome. Port will
fail in gnomemedia.
